name: Isaac Lucas
heroTitle: Let's Build for the web together
heroIntro: Hi, I'm a Isaac Lucas, a Front-end Developer living on the beautiful Island of Curaçao.
bio: I'm a lifelong learner and front-end developer living on the beautiful island of Curaçao 🌴.

My path into web development began several years ago when I discovered HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I was immediately drawn to the blend of creativity and problem-solving that comes with building for the web, and JavaScript has kept me curious ever since.

I thrive on exploring new technologies and constantly refining my craft. I place a strong emphasis on web accessibility and performance, ensuring every project is highly inclusive, blazing fast, and built with clean, maintainable code.

Throughout my career, I've worked with a diverse toolkit including SvelteKit, TypeScript, React, Vue, Razor (.NET), and Ruby on Rails. These days, I'm especially excited about AI, autonomous agents and harness engeineering, focusing on building agentic AI systems, custom AI agents, and the infrastructure to support them.
funFacts: 🎮 Gaming with my kids — usually losing at Rocket League
🏀 Treating Chess and Basketball as my two main sports
🎸 Exploring genres on the guitar, from Metal and Jazz to Música Llanera 🪉

seo.defaultDescription: Isaac Lucas — Front-end Developer based in Curaçao. Building beautiful, functional web applications.
